ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time the tweet was posted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who posted the tweet */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the tweet */,
  "retweet_of_tweet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the original tweet if this tweet is a retweet */,
  "quote_of_tweet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the original tweet if this tweet is a quote */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the tweet was posted */,
  "hashtags" TEXT /* Hashtags used in the tweet */,
  "mentions" TEXT /* User mentions in the tweet */,
  "is_sensitive" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tweet contains sensitive content */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the tweet */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the tweet (e.g., web, mobile app) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_retweet_of_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("retweet_of_tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_quote_of_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("quote_of_tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined Twitter */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's bio */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile image */,
  "website" TEXT /* User's website */,
  "location" TEXT /* User's location */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is verified */,
  "total_tweets" INTEGER /* Total number of tweets by the user */,
  "total_following" INTEGER /* Number of users the user is following */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement record */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tweet the engagement metrics belong to */,
  "retweets" INTEGER /* Number of retweets the tweet received */,
  "favorites" INTEGER /* Number of favorites the tweet received */,
  "replies" INTEGER /* Number of replies the tweet received */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Number of impressions the tweet received */,
  "engagement_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the engagement metrics were recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user the analytics belong to */,
  "avg_retweets" REAL /* Average number of retweets the user receives per tweet */,
  "avg_favorites" REAL /* Average number of favorites the user receives per tweet */,
  "avg_replies" REAL /* Average number of replies per tweet */,
  "avg_impressions" REAL /* Average number of impressions per tweet */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Engagement rate (total engagement / total followers) */,
  "top_hashtags" TEXT /* Top hashtags used by the user */,
  "top_mentions" TEXT /* Top user mentions by the user */,
  "top_sources" TEXT /* Top sources used for tweeting */,
  "top_locations" TEXT /* Top locations from which the user tweets */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the analytics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
